dataCleaning.noteText: Data cleaning exclusions: 1232 schools excluded before plotting (missing X: 109, missing Y: 1225, invalid X: 0, invalid Y: 0, both axes overlap: 102). Counts are non-exclusive by axis. Regression and confidence bands are fit only on the 354 included schools.
